use_cases: Creates animated starfield backgrounds for landing pages
Adds cosmic visual effect to hero sections
Provides ambient motion for space or night-themed interfaces
Enhances portfolio or creative agency websites with star animations
Serves as decorative background for storytelling or dark-themed designs
ai_summary: A lightweight starfield background component that renders animated stars with configurable count, size, speed, and color. Uses CSS box-shadows to efficiently render multiple stars and motion/react for smooth vertical scrolling animation in an infinite loop. Perfect for creating immersive cosmic or night-sky effects on landing pages and hero sections.
